---
title: "feedback"
format: html
---


We welcome feedback from our student's all the time to better improve our services as psychology technicians and ways to improve our website and resources. 


[Students] - Please use the Microsoft Forms for sanonymous responding. Please click here: [Link]()

[Internal Staff] - Please contact [psychology.technician@wrexham.ac.uk](mailto:psychology.technician@wrexham.ac.uk]) if you wish for any adjustments to our website or services. 

[Externals] - Please contact [psychology.technician@wrexham.ac.uk](mailto:psychology.technician@wrexham.ac.uk]) for any queries on our site.
